new_tasks.title: Non-clinical pay uplift -- assess HR Systems impact
new_tasks.description: Jasmin Khokhra has kicked off the non-clinical pay uplift project with UCEA. Kevin needs to review the scope and determine what HR Systems involvement is required, including any PeopleXD configuration, reporting, or payroll process changes.

new_tasks.title: DTP1334 SHSMS Evaluation -- review legal compliance requirements from Christopher
new_tasks.description: Christopher Sanders has sent a follow-up to the DTP1334 evaluation meeting with legal compliance requirements split into a list. Kevin needs to review and incorporate these into the evaluation weightings and scoring framework.
